prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Audit Redis protected-mode behavior. Find the C source files in redis/redis that (1) load and validate bind/protected-mode configuration, (2) decide whether a remote client should be rejected before authentication, and (3) return the protected-mode error sent to disallowed connections.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the redis-database fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Audit Redis protected-mode behavior. Find the C source files in redis/redis that (1) load and validate bind/protected-mode configuration, (2) decide whether a remote client should be rejected before authentication, and (3) return the protected-mode error sent to disallowed connections.

params.search_pattern: protected mode OR bind OR reject OR remote client
